blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 11.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 43".
